metadata.name: Motor Starter with Emergency Stop and Undervoltage Protection
metadata.description: Control and power schematic showing a motor starter controlled by an emergency stop with mechanical contact guidance and undervoltage relay protection.

elements.name: S1 Emergency stop
elements.description: Emergency stop button with mechanical contact guidance (normally closed) used to interrupt the undervoltage relay circuit.

elements.name: Q1 <U
elements.description: Undervoltage protection relay used to disconnect the motor starter when supply voltage drops below threshold.

elements.name: Motor starter
elements.description: Electromagnetic contactor controlling power to the motor.

elements.name: M1 3~
elements.description: Three-phase motor load controlled by the motor starter contactor.

elements.name: L
elements.description: Three-phase power supply feeding the motor starter and motor circuit.
